subject: This Week's School Lunch Menu — July 28-Aug 1
snippet: View this week's hot lunch menu for Lincoln Elementary.
bodyText: Dear Families, Please find this week's hot lunch menu attached. Monday: Grilled cheese and tomato soup. Tuesday: Chicken tacos. Wednesday: Mac and cheese. Thursday: Pizza. Friday: Hot dogs. Milk is included with every meal. Enjoy!

subject: After-school choir practice this Wednesday July 30 at 4:00 PM
snippet: Choir practice is this Wednesday July 30 at 4:00 PM in the music room.
bodyText: Dear Choir Families, This is a reminder that after-school choir practice will be held this Wednesday, July 30, 2026 at 4:00 PM in the music room (Room 22). Practice will run until 5:00 PM. Please ensure your child has a ride home by 5:15 PM. See you Wednesday!

subject: Soccer game Saturday August 2 at 10:00 AM — Riverside Park
snippet: Game day! Soccer game this Saturday August 2 at 10:00 AM at Riverside Park.
bodyText: Hi soccer families! We have a game this Saturday, August 2, 2026 at 10:00 AM at Riverside Park, Field 1. Please arrive by 9:30 AM for warm-up. Bring water, shin guards, and your team jersey. Go Riverside Rockets!

extractedEvent.title: Soccer game — Riverside Rockets
extractedEvent.description: Arrive by 9:30 AM. Bring water, shin guards, team jersey.

subject: Parent-Teacher Conference — Thursday July 31 at 5:30 PM
snippet: Your parent-teacher conference with Mr. Davis is scheduled for Thursday July 31 at 5:30 PM.
bodyText: Dear Parent/Guardian, Your parent-teacher conference with Mr. Davis (3rd Grade) is scheduled for Thursday, July 31, 2026 at 5:30 PM in Room 8. The conference will last approximately 20 minutes. This is an excellent opportunity to discuss your child's academic progress and upcoming goals. If you need to reschedule, please contact the school office by Wednesday.

extractedEvent.title: Parent-teacher conference — Mr. Davis
extractedEvent.description: 3rd Grade conference with Mr. Davis, 20 minutes

subject: Report Card Available — Q4 2026
snippet: Your child's Q4 report card is now available in the parent portal.
bodyText: Dear Parent/Guardian, Your child's Q4 2026 report card is now available in the Lincoln Elementary parent portal at portal.lincolnelementary.example. Please log in to view grades, teacher comments, and attendance records. If you have questions about your child's report card, please contact their teacher directly. Thank you for your continued support.

subject: Early Dismissal Friday August 1 at 1:00 PM — Staff Development Day
snippet: Reminder: Early dismissal this Friday August 1 at 1:00 PM due to staff professional development.
bodyText: Dear Families, Please be advised that Lincoln Elementary School will have an early dismissal this Friday, August 1, 2026 at 1:00 PM due to a staff professional development day. Please arrange pickup for your child by 1:15 PM. After-school care will be available for registered students until 5:30 PM. Thank you for your understanding.

extractedEvent.title: Early dismissal school pickup
extractedEvent.description: Pickup child by 1:15 PM. After-school care available until 5:30 PM.
